MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY LEE, JAY AS TO DEFENDANT PG & E CLAIMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PG & E CLAIMS THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE DAMAGE CLAIM WAS NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, NOR DID IT SATISFACTORILY ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED THE DAMAGE.
